'''鈭歾-l-ch''' ('''zalacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jag|jag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jag|jag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-l-ch
|-
! Lemma
| zalacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalachithi|zalachithi]] || [[word:zalachiji|zalachiji]] || [[word:zalachishi|zalachishi]] || [[word:zalachi|zalachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalachuthuth|zalachuthuth]] || [[word:zalachujuj|zalachujuj]] || [[word:zalachushush|zalachushush]] || [[word:zalach|zalach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalachuthu|zalachuthu]] || [[word:zalachuju|zalachuju]] || [[word:zalachushu|zalachushu]] || [[word:zalachu|zalachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalachufuth|zalachufuth]] || [[word:zalachufuj|zalachufuj]] || [[word:zalachufush|zalachufush]] || [[word:zalachuf|zalachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalachethe|zalachethe]] || [[word:zalacheje|zalacheje]] || [[word:zalacheshe|zalacheshe]] || [[word:zalache|zalache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalachothoth|zalachothoth]] || [[word:zalachojoj|zalachojoj]] || [[word:zalachoshosh|zalachoshosh]] || [[word:zalach|zalach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalachotho|zalachotho]] || [[word:zalachojo|zalachojo]] || [[word:zalachosho|zalachosho]] || [[word:zalacho|zalacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalachofoth|zalachofoth]] || [[word:zalachofoj|zalachofoj]] || [[word:zalachofosh|zalachofosh]] || [[word:zalachof|zalachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalach忙th忙|zalach忙th忙]] || [[word:zalach忙j忙|zalach忙j忙]] || [[word:zalach忙sh忙|zalach忙sh忙]] || [[word:zalach忙|zalach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalachathath|zalachathath]] || [[word:zalachajaj|zalachajaj]] || [[word:zalachashash|zalachashash]] || [[word:zalach|zalach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalachatha|zalachatha]] || [[word:zalachaja|zalachaja]] || [[word:zalachasha|zalachasha]] || [[word:zalacha|zalacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalachafath|zalachafath]] || [[word:zalachafaj|zalachafaj]] || [[word:zalachafash|zalachafash]] || [[word:zalachaf|zalachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zalachasha|zalachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozalachasha|gozalachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizalachasha|gokizalachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zalachn眉sha|zalachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozalachnkn眉sha|gozalachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizalachn眉sha|gokizalachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zalachsh毛sha|zalachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozalachnksh毛sha|gozalachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizalachsh毛sha|gokizalachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalachrosha|zalachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalachnkrosha|gozalachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalachrosha|gokizalachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zalachmusha|zalachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalachnkmusha|gozalachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalachmusha|gokizalachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zalachsherasha|zalachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozalachnksherasha|gozalachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizalachsherasha|gokizalachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zalachngasha|zalachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozalachnkngasha|gozalachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizalachngasha|gokizalachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zalachyasha|zalachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozalachnkyasha|gozalachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizalachyasha|gokizalachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zalachyamasha|zalachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozalachnkyamasha|gozalachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizalachyamasha|gokizalachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalachn眉sh毛sha|zalachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalachnkn眉sh毛sha|gozalachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalachn眉sh毛sha|gokizalachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalachn眉rosha|zalachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalachnkn眉rosha|gozalachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalachn眉rosha|gokizalachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalachn眉musha|zalachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalachnkn眉musha|gozalachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalachn眉musha|gokizalachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalachsh毛n眉sha|zalachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalachnksh毛n眉sha|gozalachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalachsh毛n眉sha|gokizalachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalachsh毛rosha|zalachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalachnksh毛rosha|gozalachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalachsh毛rosha|gokizalachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalachsh毛musha|zalachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalachnksh毛musha|gozalachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalachsh毛musha|gokizalachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalachron眉sha|zalachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalachnkron眉sha|gozalachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalachron眉sha|gokizalachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalachrosh毛sha|zalachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalachnkrosh毛sha|gozalachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalachrosh毛sha|gokizalachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalachromusha|zalachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalachnkromusha|gozalachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalachromusha|gokizalachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalachmun眉sha|zalachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalachnkmun眉sha|gozalachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalachmun眉sha|gokizalachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalachmush毛sha|zalachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalachnkmush毛sha|gozalachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalachmush毛sha|gokizalachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalachmurosha|zalachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalachnkmurosha|gozalachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalachmurosha|gokizalachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zalach|zalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙l忙ch|z忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozalach|hozalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙l忙ch|hoz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozalach|hohozalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙l忙ch|hohoz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zalach|n眉zalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙l忙ch|n眉z忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zalach|n眉n眉zalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙l忙ch|n眉n眉z忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zalach|n茂zalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙l忙ch|n茂z忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zalach|n茂n茂zalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙l忙ch|n茂n茂z忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzalach|luzalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙l忙ch|luz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzalach|luluzalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙l忙ch|luluz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizalach|lizalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙l忙ch|liz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizalach|lilizalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙l忙ch|liliz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozalach|kozalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙l忙ch|koz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozalach|kokozalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙l忙ch|kokoz忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezalach|kezalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙l忙ch|kez忙l忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezalach|kekezalach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙l忙ch|kekez忙l忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
